_comment: BurnRate ingestion config. Edit paths here or via the dashboard. All paths use forward slashes.
_source_folders_note: Points at the _jsonl_mirror folder inside BurnRate/.
run_ingest.bat copies fresh JSONL files there from ~/.claude/projects/ before each ingest run.
source_folders entry "." means: scan the root of claude_projects_dir directly (no subfolder).
To also ingest bare Claude Code CLI sessions, add a second mirror set and entry here.
_db_dir_note: null = use BurnRate/db/ relative to this config. Set absolute path to write elsewhere.
_plan_tier_note: claude.ai plan: pro or team. Informational — used in dashboard labels.
_weekly_token_limit_note: Approximate weekly effective-input token limit. Calibrate as follows:
1. Note the % shown on claude.ai Settings -> Usage -> Weekly limits.
2. Run: python src/cowork_estimator.py report — note this weeks total_effective_input.
3. But: that number only covers Cowork sessions. Other claude.ai chat sessions also
count toward the weekly limit but are NOT captured by BurnRate (they do not write JSONL).
4. From screenshot (2026-05-19, Monday): 31% used. BurnRate sees 1.73M this week.
If Cowork is ~half of total usage, weekly limit is roughly 1.73M / 0.31 / 0.5 = ~11M.
If Cowork is most of usage, weekly limit is roughly 1.73M / 0.31 = ~5.6M.
Set a conservative estimate and adjust until the gauge tracks the claude.ai % closely.
_weekly_reset_note: Confirmed from claude.ai Settings -> Usage: Resets Sun 1:00 AM (local time).
_current_session_note: Per-session limit also exists (separate from weekly). Observed at 19% on 2026-05-19.
_schedule_note: Informational — actual scheduling via Windows Task Scheduler (run_ingest.bat).
_comment_source: claude_projects_dir is relative to the BurnRate root (CWD when run_ingest.bat executes). The bat mirrors ~/.claude/projects/... into _jsonl_mirror/ before ingest runs.
_calibration_note: Best estimate from Jun 4 delta calibration: 63.8M. Jun 7 calibrations invalidated — retroactive ingest caused phantom deltas. Use clean delta pairs only (both anchor and current must have prev_cowork > 0).
